system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Athletics TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You climb and crawl with the grace of a tiger, allowing you to move up sheer surfaces and over narrow rooftops, seemingly in defiance of gravity. Make an Athletics roll against TN 6. On a success you can climb up vertical surface or amble across narrow pathways with ease. This allows you to move 20 feet per Rank of Qi. On a Total Success you may also use an additional Kung Fu Technique while performing Crawling Tiger. Cathartic: When used Cathartically you are completely silent as you move. This imposes a -1d10 Penalty per Rank of Qinggong on efforts to Detect you when sound would be relevant.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically you are completely silent as you move. This imposes a -1d10 Penalty per Rank of Qinggong on efforts to Detect you when sound would be relevant.
